_comment: Arm-only probe — same matcher vocabulary as the arm step in recipe.fleet.diagnose.armprobe, but completes with succeed instead of continuing to disarm. Used when Mission Control start-run preflight or LiveDrive must verify arming without auto-disarm. Descriptor still sets cancelRecipe to recipe.fleet.diagnose.cancel so operator cancel mid-probe attempts cleanup disarm.

then.detail: Autopilot refused arm. Inspect the audit trace for the underlying reason (GPS lock, battery, levelling, calibration state, etc.).
Autopilot blocked arm — sensor calibration is required before this vehicle can be armed.
Autopilot is in a mode that disallows arming. Switch to an arming-capable mode and retry.
Autopilot is busy with a higher-priority operation. Wait for it to clear and retry.
Vehicle is not connected — link is down or the session is not live.
MAVSDK session unavailable — link to autopilot is not established.
Arm refused by authority gate (live-mission or live-drive policy).
Arm probe failed with an unhandled outcome — see audit trace for details.
